text: Artificial intelligence is changing many aspects of our lives, from job applications to medical diagnoses. However, this rapid growth brings important ethical questions. One major concern is bias. If AI learns from data that contains historical prejudices, it can make unfair decisions, for example in hiring or loan approvals. This makes *fairness* a crucial issue. Another serious problem is privacy. AI systems often require huge amounts of personal data, raising the risk of misuse. To build trust, companies must ensure *transparency*, explaining clearly how their AI works and what data it uses. Ultimately, *responsible AI development* means creating technology that respects human rights and benefits everyone equally.
